title: Software Update - DFU - Perform DFU with no internet [New]
scenario: DFU shows "Feature unavailable" dialog when internet connection is lost during firmware update flow on Device Settings > Software Update
steps: 1. Pair the headset with the mobile device and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Turn off Wi-Fi on the mobile device.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update.
5. Turn on Wi-Fi on the mobile device.
7. Turn off Wi-Fi on the mobile device.
expected: Step 4: A "Feature unavailable" dialog is displayed. Step 6: The 3-step DFU (Device Firmware Update) screens are shown. Step 8: A "Feature unavailable" dialog is displayed again.
